name: crewmate
description: A small bean-shaped creature in a spacesuit that is a little space boi.

moves.name: Emergency Meeting
moves.desc: You think that the opponent is sus, so you do the reasonable.

moves.name: Cams
moves.desc: You check cams and see your opponent being sus.

moves.name: Weapons
moves.desc: You go to weapons to grab a viking hat for extra defense.

moves.name: Fix Comms
moves.desc: You run to communications to stop a sabotage. In the room you learn that only one person didn't come to save the ship, your opponent.

moves.name: Medbay
moves.desc: Go to medbay to heal yourself.
